data.title: KangLi International Holdings Schedules Board Meeting for Annual Results
data.description:
KangLi International Holdings Limited ( (HK:6890) ) has shared an update.

KangLi International Holdings Limited has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on March 21, 2025, to discuss and approve the annual results for the financial year ending December 31, 2024. The meeting will also consider the potential payment of a final dividend. This announcement indicates the company’s ongoing commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement, as well as its focus on financial performance and potential returns to investors.

data.title: NEPI Rockcastle Offers Dividend Options with Tax Implications
data.description:
NEPI Rockcastle Plc ( (DE:0A3) ) has issued an update.

NEPI Rockcastle Plc, a company incorporated in the Netherlands, has announced a final dividend for the six months ended 31 December 2024, allowing shareholders to choose between a capital repayment or a cash dividend. The capital repayment option is tax-efficient for South African shareholders, while the cash dividend option involves Dutch and South African withholding taxes, with specific implications for U.S. shareholders.

More about NEPI Rockcastle Plc

data.title: I-NET Corp. Achieves Seventh Consecutive Health and Productivity Certification
data.description:
I-Net Corporation ( (JP:9600) ) has provided an update.

I-NET Corp. has been recognized for the seventh consecutive year as a Health and Productivity Management Outstanding Organization in the Large-scale Corporate Division by the Ministry of Economy, Trade, and Industry. This certification highlights I-NET’s commitment to employee health through initiatives such as health seminars, mental health management exams, and promoting work-life balance. The company’s efforts have also been acknowledged with certifications like Eruboshi, Platinum Kurumin, and Hataraku Yell, underscoring its dedication to creating a workplace where employees can thrive and work with peace of mind.

More about I-Net Corporation

I-NET Corp. is based in Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture, and operates in the information processing services, system development services, and product sales industry. The company is focused on creating a supportive work environment that emphasizes employee health and wellbeing as a core component of its business strategy.

data.title: SPARX Group Recognized for Outstanding Health Management
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Sparx Group Co ( (JP:8739) ).

SPARX Group Co., Ltd. and its subsidiary, SPARX Asset Management Co., Ltd., have been recognized as Outstanding Health Management Organizations for 2025 in the SME category by the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry and the Nippon Kenko Kaigi. This certification highlights SPARX’s commitment to employee health through initiatives such as follow-up health interviews and workshops, aligning with its mission to create a healthier and happier workplace.

More about Sparx Group Co

SPARX Group Co., Ltd. operates in the financial services industry, focusing on asset management. The company offers investment management services and is committed to enhancing the wealth, health, and happiness of its stakeholders.

data.title: Guzman y Gomez Announces Change in Director’s Securities Interest
data.description:
Guzman y Gomez Ltd. ( (AU:GYG) ) has shared an update.

Guzman y Gomez Ltd. has announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Thomas Cowan, who holds various direct and indirect interests in the company’s securities. The change involves a reduction of 772,944 ordinary shares over which TDM Growth Partners Pty Ltd, where Cowan has a significant interest, acts as a discretionary investment manager. This adjustment reflects a shift in management of these shares to direct client control, indicating a potential strategic move in the company’s asset management approach.

More about Guzman y Gomez Ltd.
